_setup: In Cursor 3.9+: Settings (Ctrl+,) -> Models -> scroll to bottom
2. Paste your API key (from .env) into the API Key field
3. Paste your tunnel URL + /v1 into 'Override OpenAI Base URL'
5. Type any model name below and press Enter to add it
If you get connection errors through a proxy, add this to your Cursor settings.json:
Disabling HTTP/2 is the highest-impact fix for proxy users (Cursor defaults to override).
_note: Tunnel URL changes on server restart. Run get_tunnel_url.ps1 to get the current one.
